title: derris ernestii
intro: Derris ernestii, also known as the Indian derris or sacred derris, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and certain types of infections, due to the presence of rotenone and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Derris ernestii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to treat various health conditions.
